Your Healing Kitchen
Natural healing · Fourth trimester
Smoothie • Energy & repair • Postpartum

Power Smoothie

A thick, nutrient-dense blend for one-handed fuel on the hardest, busiest days.
Makes 1 large glass
Time 3 min
Caffeine none
For you · one-handed fuel
When to drink Any time — a fast breakfast or an afternoon refuel. Cold is fine; blend and drink one-handed while feeding.

Why this heals you

  • Banana & blueberries — potassium, fibre & antioxidants verified
  • Collagen / protein — supports tissue repair verified
  • Hemp & flax — omega-3s and protein verified
  • Whole-food energy — steadier than a snack grabbed on the run tradition
Ingredients
1Banana
½ cupBlueberries
1 cupMilk of choice
1 scoopCollagen / protein
1 tbspHemp seeds
1 tspGround flax
Method
1
Load the blender

Banana, ½ cup blueberries and 1 cup milk.

2
Add the boosters

1 scoop collagen/protein, 1 tbsp hemp, 1 tsp flax.

3
Blend & go

Blend smooth. Add a little water if thick. Drink cold.

Just for you, Mum

Built for the days you forget to eat — protein, seed-drawer omega-3s and real fruit, all one-handed. Keep the ingredients prepped and ready.

Good to know
BestBreakfast or afternoon; drink within a few hours.
Extra1 tbsp tahini or a handful of walnuts for staying power.
Why we say this
Nutrient content (protein, omega-3, potassium, antioxidants) is verified; the ‘power/energy’ framing is everyday wellness language. Not medical advice.

Snacks
Drinks
Desserts
Food, not medical advice · non-diagnostic · made for this season of motherhood
